headline: Find jobs near you
subheadline: Connect with nearby employers and workers.

nearYou.title: Near you
nearYou.subtitle: We connect workers to nearby employers. No hassle!

connectingPeople.title: Connecting People
connectingPeople.subtitle: With Zupro, finding a worker becomes easier & faster!

hirerPerks.instantHelp: Get instant help, at your doorstep!

hero.subtitle: Connecting workers and hirers — households, enterprises & quick-commerce: instantly, locally, at scale.
hero.subtitlePrefix: Connecting workers and hirers — households, enterprises & quick-commerce:

stat1.label: Domestic workers in India
stat1.sub: 3rd largest employment sector after agriculture & construction

stat2.label: Urban Indians is a migrant
stat2.sub: "I just moved — now what?" Everyone's problem.

stat3.label: Formal digital platforms exist
stat3.sub: Not LinkedIn. Not Naukri. No structured marketplace.

problem.calloutPrefix: The problem is real. The market is massive.

howItWorks.headlinePrefix: From posting a job to finding the right person —

workersSteps.step1: Register with mobile number — simple, guided, vernacular.
workersSteps.step2: Set skills, preferred area & availability. No resume needed.
workersSteps.step3: Receive instant nearby job alerts matched to your exact location.
workersSteps.step4: Accept the job and connect directly with the hirer.

hirersSteps.step1: Post a job in 60 seconds — type it or describe it.
hirersSteps.step2: Platform sends matched, verified workers instantly.
hirersSteps.step4: Connect, confirm and schedule — easy from start to finish.

card1.title: Vernacular-First
card1.desc: Hindi, Tamil, Telugu + 10 more languages. No English required.

card2.title: Fast Match
card2.desc: UltraFast matching connects hirers with the right workers quickly and accurately.

card3.title: Hyperlocal
card3.desc: Pin-code level matching — find a maid or cook in your exact neighbourhood.

card4.title: Verified Trust
card4.desc: Aadhaar-backed identity check for household roles. Hirers get the trust they need.

card5.title: Worker-First UI
card5.desc: Designed for all literacy levels. Simple, visual, guided — workers pick it up in minutes.

card6.title: Voice Interface
card6.desc: Post or find jobs by speaking — eliminating the typing barrier for workers.
